text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, a stony-faced Tamamo Cross and
Ines Fujin meet up at the back of the school.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I got da carrots and potatoes from the grocers
near the station, just like you asked!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're a lifesaver! Here you go, one bottle of
shampoo and a toothbrush!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, thanks a bunch. This really helps me out.
It's great havin' a fellow bargain hunter 'round.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. With you here, I can take advantage of
multiple sales at once!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No one can beat us when it comes to nabbin' all
the sales in town! Man, what a thrill!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh! As thanks, I'll letcha in on some real good
intel!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
No way! You can make that with potatoes and
milk?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Shh! Someone could be eavesdroppin' for all we
know!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wait... This is something I should keep a secret?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the two bargain hunters talk about
their scrimping strategies until dusk.
